prompt: Verify deterministic run-analysis rules identify candidate-worthy completed work.
Accept a Memory candidate and verify a private Memory source is created for later recall.
Accept a Skill candidate and verify private trigger metadata can match later method use.
Activate a Worker and verify semantic matching selects it for an equivalent request.
Verify Worker failure emits fallback evidence and creates an improvement candidate.
Verify same-meaning different-wording Worker matching is semantic, not keyword-only.
Verify Worker activation cannot proceed before version verification and confirmation.
Verify Worker recursion is blocked with traceable run evidence.
Verify confirmation resume still passes Worker tool policy and denies disallowed tools.
Verify analysis outbox enqueue is idempotent and claim/complete persists eventual work.
Verify private Memory and Skill rows do not leak across users.
Verify inactive candidates are inert until accepted.
Verify inactive Worker policy guard blocks execution before runtime side effects.
